title: Beyond "blah blah blah": exploring the "how" of transformation
author: Julia Bentz; Karen O'Brien & Morgan Scoville-Simonds
description: Calls for transformations are clear and multiple pathways and alternative visions for the future have been defined. We then present insights from the collection of papers that focus on the “how” of transformation. The papers describe different ways of integrating the means and the manner in transformation processes.
